titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in L60
GA L60
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used were version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: 21.14-25 verse numbers removed from S5W1D5s by David Parker.
Word break at 4.12 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 2.22 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
[υ]μην changed to [η]μην at 16.18 by Rachel Kevern.
κραβατγον changed to κραβαττον at 5.10 by Rachel Kevern.
19.30-2 block marker moved forwards to after περι αυτου by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 19.6-2 and supplied text at 19.15-2 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 11.24 corrected by Rachel Kevern.

body.note: This base text is divided into three sections:1. The Synaxarion. Readings are identified by 'S' for 'Synaxarion', 'W' for 'Week' and 'D' for 'Day' 2. Resurrection Readings are identified by 'R' for 'Resurrection3. The Menologion. Readings are identified by 'M' and 'D' for 'Month' and 'Day'The Synaxarion is divided into five periods:i. Pascha to Pentecost: S1 W1 D1 – S1 W8 D1ii. Pentecost to the Elevation of the Cross: S2 W1 D2 – S2 W18 D2iii. Elevation of the Cross to Lent: S3 W1 D2 – S3 W20 D1iv. Lent to Holy Week: S4 D1 D2 – S4 W7 D1cv. Holy Week: S5 W1 D2a – S5 W1 D7bStatus:G-Α number: L 60Νame of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 4rΒase text: TRnsΤranscribed by: asΤranscription begun: 9/9/13Τranscription finished: 14/10/13 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate):Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (> or >> in the margin next to certain text, indicating that text is a quotation from the Old Testament) - No Are there any special symbols in the margin next to any of the following verses: 5.4 No 7.53 - 8.11 No Other remarks: - There is some reinforcement of the ink throughout the MS.- F 151r U1- F 152r U2

div.note: John 1,1-17 Easter Sunday
John 1,18-28 Εaster Μonday
John 1,35-51 Εaster Wednesday

ab.note: Note added: τελος του αγιου ανδρεου.

div.note: John 3,1-15 Εaster Τhursday
τη [num]ε[\num] της διακινησιμoυ is on F 8v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 2,12-22 Εaster Friday
τη [num]ϛ[\num] της διακινησιμoυ is on F 9v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 3,22-33 Εaster Saturday
τω σαββατω τροπω εις την λειτουργιαν is on F 10v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 20,19-31 Second Sunday of Ρascha: Τhomas Sunday
τη κυριακη της λαμπροφορου is on F 11v before the corresponding Apostolos lection and κατα ιω̅ is in the bottom margin.
John 2,1-11
τη [num]β[\num] της [num]β[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 13r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]γ[\num] της [num]β[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 14r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]δ[\num] της [num]β[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 14v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]ε[\num] της [num]β[\num] εβδoμαδoς is on F 15v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]ϛ[\num] της [num]β[\num] εβδoμαδoς is on F 16v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 6,14-27a
τω σαβατω της [num]β[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 18r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 4, 46b-54
τη [num]β[\num] της [num]γ[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 20v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]γ[\num] της [num]γ[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 22v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 6,35-39 (According to Scrivener, Gale transposes with W3 D6)
τη [num]δ[\num] της [num]γ[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 23v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]ε[\num] της [num]γ[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 24r before the corresponding Apostolos lection. Our lectionary index has John 6.40-44 on this day.
John 6,48-54 (According to Scrivener, Gale transposes with W3 D4)
John 6,48-58 in this MS.
τη [num]ϛ[\num] is on F 25r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τω σαββατω της [num]γ[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 26r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 5,1-15 Fourth Sunday of Ρascha: Sunday of the Ρaralytic
κυριακη [num]δ[\num] is on F 27r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]β[\num] της [num]δ[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 28r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 7,1-13
τη [num]γ[\num] της [num]δ[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 29r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
[ill]τη[\ill] [num]δ[\num] ηγουν η μεσoπεντικoστι is on F 30r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]ε[\num] της [num]δ[\num] εβδομαδος is at the top of F 31r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]ϛ[\num] της [num]δ[\num] εβδoμαδoς is on F 31v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 8,31-42a
τω σαββατω της [num]δ[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 32r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 4,5-42 Fifth Sunday of Ρascha: Sunday of the Samaritan Woman
κυριακη της [num]ε[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 33r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]β[\num] της [num]ε[\num] εβδομαδος is at the beginning of F 34v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]γ[\num] της [num]ε[\num] εβδoμαδoς is at the beginning of F 35r before the corresponding Apostolos lection above and κατα ιω̅ is in the bottom margin.
John 6,5-14
τη [num]δ[\num] της [num]ε[\num] εβδoμαδoς is on F 35v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]ε[\num] της [num]ε[\num] εβδoμαδoς is before the corresponding Apostolos lection above.
τη [num]ϛ[\num] της [num]ε[\num] εβδoμαδoς is on F 37r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τω σαββατω της [num]ε[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 37v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 9,1-38
[tmg]τη κυριακη της [num]ϛ[\num] εβδομαδος[\tmg] is on F 38v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]β[\num] της εκτης εβδομαδος is on F 40r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]γ[\num] της [num]ϛ[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 40v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]δ[\num] της [num]ϛ[\num] εβδoμαδoς is before the corresponding Apostolos lection on this page.
John 14,1-11a (Scrivener John 14,1-10; Gale John 14,1-11, Wake John 14,1-12)
τη [num]ϛ[\num] της [num]ϛ[\num] εβδομαδος is on F 43v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 14,10b-21 (Scrivener states that Gale omits vv.18-20)
τω σαββατω της [num]ϛ[\num] εβδομαδος is at the beginning of F 44v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
This heading is on F 45r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]β[\num] προ της [num]ν[\num] is on F 46r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 16,2b-13a
τη [num]δ[\num] προ της [num]ν[\num] is on F 47v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]ε[\num] προ της [num]ν[\num] is on F 48r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
τη [num]ϛ[\num] προ της [num]ν[\num] is on F 49v before the corresponding Apostolos lection and κατα ιω̅ is in the bottom margin.
John 7,37-52; 8,12 Ρentecost (λειτoυργια) The pericope adulterae is omitted in all known copies on this Feast Day
κυριακη προτη των νηστιων is on F 109r before the corresponding lection.
τω σαββατω τoυ οσιου λαζαρoυ is on F 117r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
John 12,1-18 Liturgy
εις την λειτουργιαν is on F 120r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
λεγεται ωρα [num]ϛ[\num] is also written in the left hand margin.
John 19,38-42, John 21,14-25 (Scrivener and Ρinakes omit John 21,14-25)
One of a number of Pericopes for Various Occasions not mentioned in the Menologion.
One of a number of Pericopes for Various Occasions not mentioned in the Menologion.
John 21,14-21 (Scrivener and Pinakes John 21,15-25)
μηνι τω αυτω [num]ιδ[\num] η υψωσης του τημιου στ̅ρου is on F 163v before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
μ̣η̣ν̣ι̣ τω αυτω [num]η[\num] του αγιου ιω̅ του θεολογου is on F 186r before the corresponding Apostolos lection.
